truths: What's the most rebellious thing you've done?
Have you ever had a crush on a friend's partner?
What's the most romantic thing you've done for someone?
Have you ever ghosted someone after a date?
What's your biggest turn-off?
Have you ever kissed someone you shouldn't have?
What's the most awkward romantic moment you've had?
Have you ever lied to get out of a date?
What's something you find attractive that others might find odd?
Have you ever sent a risky text to the wrong person?
What's the boldest move you've made on a crush?
Have you ever stayed in a relationship longer than you should have?
What's your idea of a perfect date?
Have you ever had a friends-with-benefits situation?
What's the most embarrassing thing that's happened on a date?
Have you ever flirted to get something you wanted?
What's a dealbreaker for you in relationships?
Have you ever been in love with two people at once?
What's the longest you've gone without dating anyone?
Have you ever snooped through someone's phone?
What's the most spontaneous thing you've done for love?
Have you ever been caught in a lie by a partner?
What's your most controversial opinion about dating?
Have you ever reconnected with an ex?

dares: Text your crush or ex 'hey' — or show the group you don't have their number.
Let the group pick someone for you to give a genuine compliment to.
Share the last flirty message in your phone (names can be hidden).
Do your best pick-up line on another player.
Hold hands with the player to your left for one round.
Whisper a secret to the player on your right.
Let someone scroll your DMs for 15 seconds — or skip if none.
Give your best smoldering look to the camera for 10 seconds.
Describe your ideal partner using only three words.
Send a heart emoji to the last person you texted.
Let the group choose a player you must stare at silently for 20 seconds.
Read your last three emojis used out loud and explain them.
Do a slow dance alone for 20 seconds.
Tell the group your most embarrassing dating app story.
Give someone in the room a nickname based on their vibe.
Act out your idea of a perfect first kiss — solo edition.
Share the most romantic song on your playlist and play 10 seconds.
Let another player write a one-line bio for you to read aloud.
Do your best impression of someone flirting badly.
Reveal the last person you looked up on social media.
Give a 15-second pep talk to your single self from five years ago.
Let the group pick a player to swap seats with and explain why.
Describe your worst kiss without naming names.
Do a trust fall into the group — or a dramatic fake one if space is tight.
Send a compliment to someone not in the room right now.
Rate your flirting skills from 1 to 10 and demonstrate why.
